subject: enable kubectl del --force for rogue pods
commit_message:
enable kubectl del --force for rogue pods

Change-Id: Ic60262dd5b471f64bee2b1c9581edf54ab1eddd6
Issue-ID: LOG-914
Signed-off-by: Michael O'Brien <michael@obrienlabs.org>

entries.message:

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/logging-analytics-master-verify-java/206
